title: Epitaph On Edward Purdon
content:
Here lies poor Ned Purdon, from misery freed,
    Who long was a bookseller's hack;
    He led such a damnable life in this world, 
    I don't think he'll wish to come back.
meaning:
Oliver Goldsmith's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph On Edward Purdon"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
